import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let t = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut start = i
    mut scanning_ws = true
    while scanning_ws
      if start >= n
        scanning_ws = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(body, start)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if is_ws(b)
          start = start + 1
        else
          scanning_ws = false
        end
      end
    end
    mut stop = start
    mut scanning_tok = true
    while scanning_tok
      if stop >= n
        scanning_tok = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(body, stop)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if is_ws(b)
          scanning_tok = false
        else
          stop = stop + 1
        end
      end
    end
    if start < stop
      let tok = string.substring(body, start, stop)
      if tok == t
        count = count + 1
      end
      i = stop
    else
      i = n
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
